'''New Nozho''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Clak'dor IV]] that was founded by the [[Y'bith/Legends|Y'bith]]. It was named for the city of [[Nozho/Legends|Nozho]], which was destroyed by a biological attack around [[300 BBY/Legends|300 BBY]] during a civil war on the [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]]. New Nozho eventually became a notable trade port.
